tooltips.integrationToken: Your JuntoAI integration token (starts with a2a_live_...). Provided by JuntoAI when the contract is signed. One token per organization.
tooltips.baseUrl: The A2A Integration API base URL. Default: https://api.juntoai.org/api/v1/integrations

messages.testConnectionSuccess: Connection successful. A2A API is reachable.
messages.testConnectionFailed: Connection failed. Check your integration token and base URL.
